mapper.sql: id, name, name_en, province_id, center_lng, center_lat, sort, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_city WHERE province_id = #{provinceId} ORDER BY sort
SELECT FROM sys_city WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%') ORDER BY sort
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sys_city ( id, name, name_en, province_id, center_lng, center_lat, sort, status, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.name}, #{item.nameEn}, #{item.provinceId}, #{item.centerLng}, #{item.centerLat}, #{item.sort}, #{item.status}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name), name_en = VALUES(name_en), province_id = VALUES(province_id), center_lng = VALUES(center_lng), center_lat = VALUES(center_lat), sort = VALUES(sort), status = VALUES(status), update_time = VALUES(update_time)
